userStories.title: Add member invitation flow
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so I can add people without database edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can invite members by email.

userStories.title: Add member role change action
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to change a member role so permissions stay current.
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can change a member role between viewer, editor, and admin.

userStories.title: Add member revocation action
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to revoke workspace access so removed members no longer have access.

userStories.title: Review membership audit log in settings page
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes in settings so I can audit access changes.
acceptanceCriteria: The system records membership changes in an audit log.
Admins can review recent membership changes in the workspace settings page.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
